# Cats On Crack

> The Wildest Alley Cats You'll Ever Meet

Cats On Crack is an animated series and book universe created by The Metavision Multimedia Limited. It follows six chaotic alley cats navigating street life with grit, humour, and zero impulse control.

## The Series

The Cats On Crack animated series features six unforgettable characters in an urban alley setting, blending dark comedy with street culture. Available on YouTube with companion books expanding the universe.

## The Alley Squad

- **Whiskers McScruff** — The Leader. A pampered house cat turned chaos prophet who runs the crew on pure conviction.
- **Luna the Loner** — The Ghost. Silent, precise, and always three steps ahead of everyone.
- **Chubby Cheeks** — The Muscle. An ex-show cat British Shorthair. Don't mistake the warmth for softness.
- **Gizmo the Genius** — The Inventor. A cross-eyed Siamese operating at a frequency physics can't contain.
- **Trixie the Trickster** — The Artist. The Alley's graffiti queen and visual historian.
- **Toothless Terry** — The Scheme Engine. A hairless Sphynx who always knows a guy.

## Official Merch

Cats On Crack merch features character apparel, collectible stickers, enamel pins, art prints, and accessories — all available at catsoncrack.co.uk/merch.

## Parent Company

Cats On Crack is a brand of The Metavision Multimedia Limited, a UK-based AI creative agency. Learn more at https://themetavision.co.uk
